human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #1016 requirements for agency-operations-specific workflow handling, evidence and confidentiality expectations, advisory, editorial, legal, contractual, rights, production, and signoff boundaries, scenario completeness, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, execution-processing-and-fulfillment, and professional-and-information-services sets are declared and validated.

Scenario coverage includes normal agency workflow execution, incomplete inputs, QA failures, missing completion evidence, confidentiality conflicts, deadline and change exceptions, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence facts, conflicting policies, realistic terminology, and tenant adaptation.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to evidence-backed agency workflow status, project setup, creative and media handoffs, review coordination, delivery exceptions, confidentiality handling, and completion evidence rather than legal, editorial, privacy, media strategy, creative direction, financial, production, contractual, rights, or final signoff authority.

Source set includes 4A's code, agency search, and pitch ownership guidance, IAB/4A's media-buy terms, AICP digital production guidelines, FTC online advertising guidance, and NAI self-regulatory privacy framework with explicit refresh and decay posture.

Boundary logic explicitly prevents unsupported delivery, unauthorized disclosure or reuse, unreviewed claim or creative approval, unresolved deadline or change exception, and generic treatment of materially different agency channels or production workflows.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguity is recorded as tenant, channel, engagement, SOW, NDA, rights, production, publisher, platform, privacy, and authority prerequisites for specialized agency operations execution.

Runtime remains specification-based; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, retrieval wiring, mutation safeguards, rollback controls, and non-regression validation.
